input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.10.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.10.1.1
            TITLE: all accumulator containers must be:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.10.1.1: All Accumulator Containers must be:
F.10.1.1 All Accumulator Containers must be:  
a. Designed to withstand forces from deceleration in all directions 
b. Made from a Nonflammable Material ( F.1.18 )

final_answer: F.10.1.1 All Accumulator Containers must be: a. Designed to withstand forces from deceleration in all directions b. Made from a Nonflammable Material ( F.1.18 )
